title: External Sync Envelope
description: Wrapper for synchronizing governance messages with external systems (e.g., Confluence, Neo4j, Notion)

direction.description: Whether data is going out to or coming in from the external system

payload_type.description: Which contract schema the payload conforms to

payload.description: The wrapped message — must validate against its own schema before wrapping

adapter.description: Optional — identifier for the integration adapter handling this sync
